MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Sheila Lichtblau, Esq., WRIGHT ROBINSON, 44 Montgomery Street, Eighteenth Floor, San Francisco, CA, 94104, 415-391-7111, for defendant and moving party San Francisco Independent Taxi Association. Mark L. Webb, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF MARK L. WEBB, 294 Page Street, San Francisco, CA 94102, 415-621-4173 appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Virginia Esposito.
